During residency, she provided hands-on training in microsurgical techniques to visiting endodontists and residents from around the world, engaged in clinical research, and developed a love of teaching with the dental students. Dr. Lu is an active member of the American Association of Endodontists and the American Dental Association. When not in the office taking care of her patients, she likes spending time with family and friends, traveling, or even having a glass of wine.

As experts in endodontic care, we specialize in advanced treatments designed to save teeth, relieve discomfort, and restore confidence. Our highly skilled team combines years of experience with state-of-the-art technology to deliver precision care tailored to your unique needs. We place your comfort and peace of mind at the heart of everything we do. From root canal therapy to complex endodontic treatments, our compassionate approach ensures a stress-free experience in a welcoming environment.

She is a third-generation dentist. Received her Dental Degree in Science from the International University of Catalonia (UIC) in 2015 (Spain) and worked in private practice at Clinica ECO she was also a clinical attending at the predoctoral department of the International University of Catalonia. In 2018, she moved to Philadelphia to complete her specialty training in Endodontics and Endodontic Microsurgery at the University of Pennsylvania.
